languages.text: "Утверждение второе: есть два Нунциуса. Это также неопровержимый факт. Первый — фигмент моего воображения, плод безумия и одновременно якорь, удерживающий мой разум от дальнейшей деградации. Его я проецирую на сервочереп, модель не обладающую какими-либо надстройками, кроме вспомогательного люмена и самописца. Он не способен вести беседу или иметь свое мнение. Я даже не знаю из чьего черепа он сделан".

"Thesis two: there are two Nunciuses. This is also an incontrovertible fact. The first Nuncius is a figment of my imagination, the product of my insanity and, at the same time, the anchor that keeps my mind from further degradation. I project it onto a servo-skull, a model with no additional features other than an auxiliary lumen and an autoquill. It is incapable of conducting a conversation or holding an opinion. I do not even know from whose skull it was made."
languages.original_text: "Утверждение второе: есть два Нунциуса. Это также неопровержимый факт. Его я проецирую на сервочереп, модель не обладающую какими-либо надстройками, кроме вспомогательного люмена и самописца. Он не способен вести беседу или иметь свое мнение. Я даже не знаю из чьего черепа он сделан".

The first Nuncius is a figment of my imagination, the product of my insanity and, at the same time, the anchor that keeps my mind from further degradation. I project it onto a servo-skull, a model with no additional features other than an auxiliary lumen and an autoquill. It is incapable of conducting a conversation or holding an opinion. I do not even know from whose skull it was made."

"Thesis two: there are two Nunciuses. This is also an incontrovertible fact. The first Nuncius is a figment of my imagination, the product of my insanity and, at the same time, the anchor that keeps my mind from further degradation. I project it onto a 17-401 servo-skull, a standard model with no additional features other than an auxiliary lumen and an autoquill. It is incapable of conducting a conversation or holding an opinion. I do not even know from whose skull it was made."

"Thesis two: there are two Nunciuses. This is also an incontrovertible fact. It is incapable of conducting a conversation or holding an opinion. I do not even know from whose skull it was made."

"Thesis two: there are two Nunciuses. This is also an incontrovertible fact. The first Nuncius is a figment of my imagination, the product of my insanity and, at the same time, the anchor that keeps my mind from further degradation. I project it onto a servo-skull, a model with no additional features other than an auxiliary lumen and an autoquill. It is incapable of conducting a conversation or holding an opinion. I do not even know from whose skull it was made."

languages.text: «Tesis dos: Hay dos Nuncius. Esto también es un hecho irrefutable. El primer Nuncius es un fragmento de mi imaginación, fruto de mi locura y a la vez el ancla que evita que mi mente degenere aún más. Lo proyecto en un servocráneo cuyas únicas funciones adicionales son un lumen auxiliar y una autopluma. Es incapaz de conversar ni tener opiniones. Ni siquiera sé de quién es el cráneo original».
languages.original_text: "Thesis two: there are two Nunciuses. This is also an incontrovertible fact. The first Nuncius is a figment of my imagination, the product of my insanity and, at the same time, the anchor that keeps my mind from further degradation. I project it onto a servo-skull, a model with no additional features other than an auxiliary lumen and an autoquill. It is incapable of conducting a conversation or holding an opinion. I do not even know from whose skull it was made."

traits.locale_text: «Tesis dos: Hay dos Nuncius. Esto también es un hecho irrefutable. El primer Nuncius es un fragmento de mi imaginación, fruto de mi locura y a la vez el ancla que evita que mi mente degenere aún más. Lo proyecto en un servocráneo cuyas únicas funciones adicionales son un lumen auxiliar y una autopluma. Es incapaz de conversar ni tener opiniones. Ni siquiera sé de quién es el cráneo original».

languages.text: “论点二：有两个努恩修斯。这一点亦毋庸置疑。第一个努恩修斯是我的假想，是我疯狂的产物，也是阻止我心智进一步退化的锚点。我把它投射到一个伺服头骨上。这个型号除了流明灯和自动羽毛笔外，没有任何附加功能。它无法进行对话，更无法持有观点。我甚至不知道那是用谁的头骨做的。”
languages.original_text: "Thesis two: there are two Nunciuses. This is also an incontrovertible fact. The first Nuncius is a figment of my imagination, the product of my insanity and, at the same time, the anchor that keeps my mind from further degradation. I project it onto a servo-skull, a model with no additional features other than an auxiliary lumen and an autoquill. It is incapable of conducting a conversation or holding an opinion. I do not even know from whose skull it was made."

traits.locale_text: “论点二：有两个努恩修斯。这一点亦毋庸置疑。第一个努恩修斯是我的假想，是我疯狂的产物，也是阻止我心智进一步退化的锚点。我把它投射到一个伺服头骨上。这个型号除了流明灯和自动羽毛笔外，没有任何附加功能。它无法进行对话，更无法持有观点。我甚至不知道那是用谁的头骨做的。”

languages.text: « Hypothèse numéro deux : il y a deux Nuncius. Il s'agit également d'un fait indéniable. Le premier Nuncius est le produit de mon imagination, une hallucination née de ma folie et, en même temps, l'ancre qui empêche mon esprit de se dégrader davantage. Je le projette sur un servocrâne, un modèle standard sans fonctionnalités particulières outre le lumen auxiliaire et l'autoplume dont il est équipé. Il est incapable de tenir une conversation ou d'avoir une opinion. Je ne sais même pas à qui ce crâne appartenait à l'origine. »
languages.original_text: "Thesis two: there are two Nunciuses. This is also an incontrovertible fact. The first Nuncius is a figment of my imagination, the product of my insanity and, at the same time, the anchor that keeps my mind from further degradation. I project it onto a servo-skull, a model with no additional features other than an auxiliary lumen and an autoquill. It is incapable of conducting a conversation or holding an opinion. I do not even know from whose skull it was made."

traits.locale_text: « Hypothèse numéro deux : il y a deux Nuncius. Il s'agit également d'un fait indéniable. Je le projette sur un servocrâne, un modèle standard sans fonctionnalités particulières outre le lumen auxiliaire et l'autoplume dont il est équipé. Il est incapable de tenir une conversation ou d'avoir une opinion. Je ne sais même pas à qui ce crâne appartenait à l'origine. »

languages.text: "İkinci tez: İki tane Nuncius var. Bu da tartışılmaz bir gerçek. Birinci Nuncius; hayal gücümün bir ürünü, deliliğimin bir sonucu ve aynı zamanda zihnimin daha fazla bozulmasını engelleyen çapa. Onu, yardımcı bir lümen ve otoyazar dışında hiçbir ek özelliği olmayan bir hizmelet modeline yansıtıyorum. Bir konuşma yürütemez veya bir fikir sahibi olamaz. Hangi kafatasından yapıldığını bile bilmiyorum."
languages.original_text: "Thesis two: there are two Nunciuses. This is also an incontrovertible fact. The first Nuncius is a figment of my imagination, the product of my insanity and, at the same time, the anchor that keeps my mind from further degradation. I project it onto a servo-skull, a model with no additional features other than an auxiliary lumen and an autoquill. It is incapable of conducting a conversation or holding an opinion. I do not even know from whose skull it was made."

traits.locale_text: "İkinci tez: İki tane Nuncius var. Bu da tartışılmaz bir gerçek. Birinci Nuncius; hayal gücümün bir ürünü, deliliğimin bir sonucu ve aynı zamanda zihnimin daha fazla bozulmasını engelleyen çapa. Onu, yardımcı bir lümen ve otoyazar dışında hiçbir ek özelliği olmayan bir hizmelet modeline yansıtıyorum. Bir konuşma yürütemez veya bir fikir sahibi olamaz. Hangi kafatasından yapıldığını bile bilmiyorum."

languages.text: "These 2: Es gibt zwei Nunciusse. Das ist ebenfalls eine unumstößliche Tatsache. Der erste Nuncius ist ein Hirngespinst, ein Produkt meines Wahnsinns, gleichzeitig aber der Anker, der meinen weiteren geistigen Verfall verhindert. Ich projiziere es auf einen Servoschädel, ein Modell ohne Zusatzfunktionen außer einem Hilfslumen und einer Autofeder. Er kann weder eine Unterhaltung führen, noch eine Meinung vertreten. Ich weiß nicht einmal, aus wessen Schädel er hergestellt wurde."
languages.original_text: "Thesis two: there are two Nunciuses. This is also an incontrovertible fact. The first Nuncius is a figment of my imagination, the product of my insanity and, at the same time, the anchor that keeps my mind from further degradation. I project it onto a servo-skull, a model with no additional features other than an auxiliary lumen and an autoquill. It is incapable of conducting a conversation or holding an opinion. I do not even know from whose skull it was made."

traits.locale_text: "These 2: Es gibt zwei Nunciusse. Das ist ebenfalls eine unumstößliche Tatsache. Der erste Nuncius ist ein Hirngespinst, ein Produkt meines Wahnsinns, gleichzeitig aber der Anker, der meinen weiteren geistigen Verfall verhindert. Ich projiziere es auf einen Servoschädel, ein Modell ohne Zusatzfunktionen außer einem Hilfslumen und einer Autofeder. Er kann weder eine Unterhaltung führen, noch eine Meinung vertreten. Ich weiß nicht einmal, aus wessen Schädel er hergestellt wurde."

languages.text: 「テーゼ2：ヌンシウスは2人いる。これも紛れもない事実である。最初のヌンシウスは私の想像の産物であり、私の狂気の産物であると同時に、私の心をこれ以上堕落させないための錨でもある。私はそれを17-401のサーボ・スカルに投影する。標準モデルで、補助ルーメンとオートクィル以外の追加機能はない。会話をすることも、意見を持つこともできない。誰の頭蓋骨から作られたのかさえわからない」。
languages.original_text: "Thesis two: there are two Nunciuses. This is also an incontrovertible fact. The first Nuncius is a figment of my imagination, the product of my insanity and, at the same time, the anchor that keeps my mind from further degradation. I project it onto a 17-401 servo-skull, a standard model with no additional features other than an auxiliary lumen and an autoquill. It is incapable of conducting a conversation or holding an opinion. I do not even know from whose skull it was made."
